run_summary.summary: ⚠️ Brandi could not scan Gmail this run — the OAuth refresh token returned `invalid_grant`, meaning it has expired or been revoked. No emails were read and no deals were updated. Action required: re-authorize Gmail access so Brandi can resume scanning.
run_summary.error: Gmail OAuth refresh token invalid (invalid_grant). Re-authorization required.

suggestions.message: Gmail OAuth token has expired. Please re-authorize Brandi's Gmail access to resume scheduled email scanning.
